content_body: We visited Atlanta to attend a basketball tournament at the World Congress Center. Our group of five very much enjoyed staying in this beautiful well furnished home. It boasts two master suites, an uncommon plus. Very quiet location. We did not rent a car and found it both easy and inexpensive to Uber to the Aquarium, World Congress Center, and many excellent restaurants. We were very pleased with our stay and highly recommend this home to others.
title: Very Pleased With Our Stay
